arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim delivers damning Man Utd verdict ahead of Europa League showdown
arts.sum: Ruben Amorim offers a dim view on Man Utd's future ahead of their Europa League clash with Lyon.

arts.sum: Andre Onana is set to be recalled by Manchester United boss Ruben Amorim, having been dropped for their defeat to Newcastle at the weekend after making two major mistakes

arts.ttl: Bruno Fernandes explains why Manchester United made major change to pre-match routine
arts.sum: Man Utd have played 'Take Me Home, Country Roads' before games at Old Trafford to build atmosphere this season.

arts.ttl: Man United 'looking to shift 10 players this summer' as Ruben Amorim bids to build a title-winning team

arts.ttl: Rory McIlroy adds to Manchester United speculation after Masters triumph
arts.sum: Plane trackers followed its route from Palm Beach, Florida, close to where McIlroy lives, igniting rumours that one of the club’s most famous fans is set for a matchday return
